evidence.excerpt: But then another conspiracy theory becomes the truth, my friends. And it never ends. No, it never ends. I fear the crab cat and I got stuck inside Mel's hole with MKL truck. I'm being only too aware. Did Stanley Kubrick fake the moon landing alone on a film set? Were the shadow people there? The Roswell aliens just fought the smiling man. And I'm told, and his name was cold.
